_comment: Flow 08 — US CTAF self-announce at Watsonville KWVI (non-towered, CTAF 122.975). Mirrors docs/howto_us_procedure_example.md §3. No ATC clearances — every call is a SELF_ANNOUNCE echo. Key US CTAF characteristic per FAA AIM 4-1-9: airport name appears as BOTH prefix and suffix of the plugin's acknowledgement (e.g. 'Watsonville traffic, ... , Watsonville.'). Exercises the uncontrolled/IDLE/SELF_ANNOUNCE template.
name: US CTAF — KWVI Watsonville (non-towered)

context.callsign: November One Two Three Alpha Bravo
